subject: Physical Education
chapter: Physical Education and Sports for CWSN

questions.q: What is the main objective of including sports for CWSN in the curriculum?
questions.answer: The main objective of including sports for CWSN in the curriculum is to provide equal opportunities to children with special needs to participate in sports and games, promoting their physical and mental development.

questions.q: Identify the key feature of the sports programme designed for CWSN:
What is the role of the teacher in promoting sports for CWSN?
questions.answer: The teacher plays a crucial role in promoting sports for CWSN by creating an inclusive sports environment, providing necessary support and assistance, and helping students to develop their skills and abilities.

questions.q: State the importance of sports for CWSN in their daily life.
questions.answer: Sports for CWSN is essential for their physical and mental development, helping them to build confidence, develop social skills, and become independent.

questions.q: What are the benefits of sports for CWSN in terms of their academic performance?
Describe the steps to be taken by a teacher to create an inclusive sports environment for CWSN.
questions.answer: The teacher should take the following steps to create an inclusive sports environment: (i) Identify the needs and abilities of CWSN, (ii) Provide necessary support and assistance, (iii) Adapt the sports activities to suit the needs of CWSN, and (iv) Encourage participation and inclusion of CWSN in sports activities.

questions.q: What is the role of parents in promoting sports for CWSN?
questions.answer: Parents play a significant role in promoting sports for CWSN by providing necessary support, encouragement, and resources, and helping their children to develop their skills and abilities.

questions.q: State the importance of sports for CWSN in terms of their social development.
Describe the steps to be taken by a teacher to adapt sports activities for CWSN.
questions.answer: The teacher should take the following steps to adapt sports activities: (i) Identify the needs and abilities of CWSN, (ii) Modify the sports activities to suit the needs of CWSN, (iii) Provide necessary support and assistance, and (iv) Encourage participation and inclusion of CWSN in sports activities.

questions.q: What are the benefits of sports for CWSN in terms of their physical development?
questions.answer: Sports for CWSN helps them to develop their gross and fine motor skills, improve their coordination and balance, and enhance their overall physical fitness.
